name: HRC_COMP_OBJ_INSTANCES
description: A comparison instance with association to a object instance (e.g. benefit plan) for the template.

columns.Name: INSTANCE_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: IKEY
columns.Comments: Immutable key. Oracle internal use only.

columns.Name: TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to "hrc_comp_templates_b".

columns.Name: DATE_FROM
columns.Comments: Indicates the date from the instance is active.

columns.Name: DATE_TO
columns.Comments: Indicates the date the instance  is active to.

columns.Name: REF_PRODUCT_CODE
columns.Comments: Identifies the reference owning product.

columns.Name: REF_OBJECT_NAME
columns.Comments: This column contains the name of the referenced object.

columns.Name: REF_BASE_TABLE_NAME
columns.Comments: Ref Base Table Name (stored in uppercase).

columns.Name: REF_SKID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key Surrogate Key ID to reference table.

columns.Name: BEN_DOC_IMG_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains foreign key to ben_doc_images.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ENTERPRISES.

columns.Name: ATTR_CHAR1
columns.Comments: Additional column for storing characters.

columns.Name: ATTR_CHAR2
columns.Comments: Additional column for storing characters.

columns.Name: ATTR_CHAR3
columns.Comments: Additional column for storing characters.

columns.Name: ATTR_NUMBER1
columns.Comments: Additional column for storing a number.

columns.Name: ATTR_NUMBER2
columns.Comments: Additional column for storing a number.

columns.Name: ATTR_NUMBER3
columns.Comments: Additional column for storing a number.

columns.Name: ATTR_DATE1
columns.Comments: Additional column for storing a date.

columns.Name: ATTR_DATE2
columns.Comments: Additional column for storing a date.

columns.Name: ATTR_DATE3
columns.Comments: Additional column for storing a date.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
